_publications._publicationTitle: Evaluation of quality of life in adults with neurofibromatosis 1 (NF1) using the Impact of NF1 on Quality Of Life (INF1-QOL) questionnaire.

_contextSnippet: The mean clinical severity score was 1.95 (SD 0.65) correlated r = 0.34 with total INF1-QOL score p < 0.05
resourceName: Impact of NF1 on Quality Of Life (INF1-QOL) questionnaire
details: Moderate correlation with clinical severity score (r = 0.34, p < 0.05)
